summary:
VISION OF DARKNESS OVER MYSTERY BABYLON: Brandon states that darkness is trying to set in great Mystery Babylon and describes a dark blanket that will cover the area if Zohran Mamdani is chosen as Mayor.

ELECTION CONSEQUENCES AND FREE WILL: Brandon recounts speaking to the Father about whether this man will be voted in, noting that the outcome is veiled because people still have a choice to vote.

FINANCIAL COLLAPSE AND MASS FLEEING: Brandon explicitly mentions that if this man is voted in, a dark cloud will cover the people, financial structures and institutions will fall along with all the money, and tens to hundreds of thousands of people will participate in a mass migration, fleeing the city and certain areas because they will know it is the end.
rawData: [November 09, 2025]-[The Lord has warned us for decades that this was coming]-[https://youtu.be/11sPAR1XXmE]-[Darkness is trying to set in Mystery Babylon. I'm telling you, great Mystery Babylon. It will be like a dark blanket will blanket thee. If they choose this man (Zohran Mamdani), I see a dark blanket blanketing, and people will flee. I hear the word flee. They will leave by the tens of thousands, if not hundreds of thousands. They will leave. People, I see them fleeing if he's voted in. People will know that this is the end. Father, you know if he'll be voted in or not; what I'm hearing you say is what I'm seeing is going to happen. He said, "No, they still have a choice. They have a choice to vote." He's held a veil. I don't see the outcome, but I see the outcome if they vote this way concerning this man. I see a dark cloud; it's a dark blanket over them. And I see financial structures falling. I see the financial institutions and all the money falling. I see a fleeing of the city, like people saying, "We're out of here!" I see it's like a mass migration of people coming. People fleeing certain areas.]
